summary: A Go-based monolithic tool leveraging MCP for orchestration and providing Goss test migration capabilities.
concerns: Heavy reliance on AI-generated test iterations (glm-agents) may introduce brittle or redundant test cases
Scattered extra test directories across multiple agent runs indicate potential test maintenance overhead
Clean git status with only metadata/changelog commits suggests recent development was administrative rather than functional
suggestions: Consolidate the numerous *_extra_test.go files generated by agents into the standard test suites to reduce clutter
Review and validate the AI-generated tests for actual edge-case coverage versus superficial assertions
Focus next development cycle on core feature expansion rather than test generation tooling
